# T&T — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> ZAPPY hosts transformative adult evening events centered on stress release, sensual exploration, and authentic human connection. The brand combines temple-like sacred space with playful intimacy, creating a luminous atmosphere where participants can shed tension and celebrate embodiment. The experience blends conscious touch workshops, sensual massage instruction, and free-form celebration in luxurious venues, all held within strict consent-based agreements. Organizers bring expertise in somatic therapy, gender studies, and community safety, creating a warm, trust-filled container for exploration.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://t-t.zappy5.app
גלו סדנאות couples massage workshop במרחב קדוש ומכבד. ZAPPY מציעה ערבי מבוגרים טרנספורמטיביים לשחרור מתח, חיבור אנושי אמיתי וחקר חושני מבוסס הסכמה.

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About T&T
ZAPPY hosts transformative adult evening events centered on stress release, sensual exploration, and authentic human connection. The brand combines temple-like sacred space with playful intimacy, creating a luminous atmosphere where participants can shed tension and celebrate embodiment. The experience blends conscious touch workshops, sensual massage instruction, and free-form celebration in luxurious venues, all held within strict consent-based agreements. Organizers bring expertise in somatic therapy, gender studies, and community safety, creating a warm, trust-filled container for exploration.

## Target Audience
adults aged 30-50 interested in stress release, human connection, and sensual exploration

## Industry
events and experiences

---
